description: Tools for discovering, searching, and reviewing Cambodia trip packages. The Vibe Booking AI agent uses these tools to help users explore curated trips, find itineraries matching their interests, and manage reviews.

tools.name: list_trips
tools.description: Browse and filter Cambodia trip packages. Use when the user asks about travel packages, itineraries, or tours. Supports filtering by category (Temples, Nature, Culture, Adventure, Food), location, price range, and duration.

duration_days.description: Filter by exact trip duration in days

tools.returns: Paginated list of trips with id, slug, name, category, location, duration_days, price_usd, rating_average, is_featured

tools.name: get_trip_detail
tools.description: Get full details of a specific trip including daily itinerary, included/excluded items, meeting point, cancellation policy, and maximum guest capacity. Use when the user wants to know more about a trip before booking.
tools.returns: Full trip details with itinerary_days, included_items, excluded_items, meeting_point, cancellation_policy, max_guests, status

tools.name: get_related_trips
tools.description: Get trips related to a specific trip (same category and location). Use for 'You might also like' recommendations after a user views a trip.

limit.description: Maximum related trips to return (max 8, default: 4)

tools.name: global_search
tools.description: Perform a full-text search across trips, places, hotels, and guides simultaneously. Use when the user types a general search query or destination name. Returns grouped results by entity type.

type.description: Restrict search to a specific entity type (default: all)

tools.returns: Grouped search results: trips, places, hotels, guides — each with items array and total count

tools.name: get_trip_reviews
tools.description: Get paginated reviews for a specific trip including average rating. Reviews include a verified badge when the reviewer has a confirmed booking. Use to help users make informed decisions about a trip.
tools.returns: items (reviews with user_name, rating, text, is_verified), total, averageRating

tools.name: get_user_favorite_trips
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's saved/wishlisted trips. Use to personalize recommendations or show the user their saved trips.
tools.returns: Paginated list of favorite TripSummary objects
